name: super-ralph
description: Project-agnostic design-first autonomous development. Auto-generates .claude/super-ralph-config.md on first use. 6-phase SADD pipeline with /review-design quality gate.

ralph-loop.reason: Provides the Stop hook that drives the autonomous iteration loop

superpowers.reason: Provides TDD, systematic-debugging, verification-before-completion, dispatching-parallel-agents, and writing-plans skills

pr-review-toolkit.reason: Provides code-reviewer, silent-failure-hunter, pr-test-analyzer, comment-analyzer, type-design-analyzer, code-simplifier agents used by /review-fix

claude-in-chrome.reason: Provides browser automation tools for /verify. Without it, browser verification falls back to manual.
